name: db-schema-comments-audit
title: Audit configured database tables and add schema comments
description: Audit the configured SQLAlchemy/MySQL database for non-project tables, then add source-of-truth table and column comments plus a script to apply them to the configured database.
creator: lijin
notes: Audited configured MySQL database: 23 expected SQLAlchemy tables, 23 actual tables, no extra or missing tables. Added canonical table/column comments in schema_comments.py, attached them to Base.metadata, added live MySQL comment sync script, added schema comment coverage test, updated backend database guidelines as global memory. Applied comments to configured MySQL database; verification shows zero missing table/column comments.
